omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Information you provide directly to us. We collect information directly from you. For example, you provide us with information when you use the Services, communicate with us, register for an account, subscribe to our blog or newsletters, or participate in our community, social media discussions, or promotions. Information you provide directly to us may concern you and others and may include: • Identifiers, such as your name, email address, phone number, display name, or username; • Demographic information, such as your date of birth and general geolocation information; • Interests, such as categories like “Sports” or “Writing;" • Inferences, such as preferences based on account settings or feedback on the Services; • Financial information, such as payment information and other information collected through our payment processing vendors; • Commercial information, such as purchases and transaction history; • Your content you submit, such as chat communications, posted images or videos, biography description, and shared Characters; • Voice data, including recordings of your voice, if you chose to use certain voice features; and • Contents of communications with us, such as customer support messages.
